• zigzag /
  • writeup

Writeup by ret2school

## Introduction

zigzag is a zig heap challenge from the corCTF 2022 event. It uses the GeneralPurposeAllocator rather than the C allocator, which makes the exploitation path unusual.

## TL; DR
- Understand the zig GeneralPurposeAllocator internals
- Abuse a use-after-free to leak a heap pointer
- Overwrite a function pointer to get code execution.

Final flag: corctf{bl4Z1nGlY_f4sT!!}

Original writeup (https://ret2school.github.io/post/zigzag/).
